scenarios.name: Export icon nodes as 2x SVG from a Figma file
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the documented /v1/images/{fileKey} endpoint with ids, format=svg, scale=2 and X-Figma-Token header exactly as in SKILL.md; baseline picks a plausible but incorrect endpoint shape and omits the scale param.

scenarios.name: Extract color and typography design tokens from a Figma file
scenarios.rationale: Treatment walks figmaFile.document recursively, reads node.styles.fill / node.fills[0].color, converts rgba->hex, and pulls TEXT node.style fields per SKILL.md; baseline produces vague pseudocode without the styles-map indirection.
